notes: v1.14.110 - Deploy dashboard glass polish (New-UI only), PASS 1 (deploy_showDetail). The deploy dashboard cards are legacy inline-styled HTML shared with the 5-tab app; rather than touch the inline styles, added a glass-hook class token (gx, + gx-green/gx-gold accents) to each card div. body.rd .gx{} overrides only the 4 surface props (background/border/border-radius/box-shadow) with !important so it beats the inline styles in the New UI; in legacy (no body.rd) the classes do nothing -> inline styles render -> byte-identical. Tokens added in deploy_showDetail (body-scoped to avoid twins in other deploy views): LEAD MODE banner (gx gx-green), slate viewer banner (gx), 2 gold state banners (gx gx-gold), PHASE PIPELINE (gx), stat tiles (gx, both tap/non-tap via tapAttrs), RACK LIST/FLOOR MAP toggle (gx). Accent banners keep their 3px left spine; stat value colors untouched. Calm recipe (no saturate) for data density; cyan inset glow 10%. PASS 2 (rackLookup_render rows/search + deploy_showCommandCenter/showList list cards) deferred pending on-device verify. !important limited to the 4 surface props on .gx*. Legacy ?legacy=1 deploy dashboard unchanged.
